---
title: "GLEAM visualization gallery"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM visualization gallery}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
plot_violin(sc, pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1], group = "group")
plot_box(sc, pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1], group = "group", sample = "sample")
plot_dot(sc, by = c("group", "celltype"))
plot_heatmap(sc, by = c("group", "celltype"), top_n = 15)
plot_pseudobulk_box(sc, pathway = rownames(sc$score)[1], group = "group", sample = "sample", celltype = "celltype")
```
